signals.headline: SEC Drops Long-Running Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC Drops Long-Running Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The SEC's decision to drop its lawsuit against Ripple has been confirmed as resolved in April 2026, removing a major regulatory overhang and driving XRP's ~10% weekly price surge to $1.42 after breaking $1.50 resistance[1][2]. This fundamental shift boosts institutional sentiment amid RLUSD stablecoin rollout on XRP Led
